name: Sidebar Separators
description: Adds movable theme-colored separators to Thymer's collections list.
instructions: Add separator rows to the collections list, then use the ↑/↓ buttons on a separator to move it between collections. Each separator is attached to a neighbouring collection and travels with it when you drag that collection — pick which one under "Moves with". Separators are drawn by this plugin, so they never show up in @-references, search, or collection pickers.
author: @akaready
